item.title: 1Password 将允许您允许 Claude 使用您的密码，但看不到它们
item.summary: Claude can now securely log you into sites like Audible and Stripe thanks to a new partnership between 1Password and Anthropic. Announced on Thursday, the new integration will allow Claude to access your password credentials without having it actually see the passwords. 1Password says this is the first browser integrat
